title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14%.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Bigger disappointment than Starmer. She is currently sleep-walking into a BBC Charter renewal without any brave thinking - reviving Project Kangaroo via iPlayer; driving a tech levy to pay BBC and local media. She’s d...
